content:
# {{projectName}}

This is an API Platform project created with the MultiTech CLI.

## Features

- Symfony-based API Platform setup
- GraphQL and REST support
- Doctrine ORM integration
- JWT authentication
- API documentation
- Docker configuration

## Getting Started

1. Make sure you have Docker and Docker Compose installed
2. Run the following commands:
   ```bash
   cd {{projectName}}
   docker-compose up -d
   ```
3. Access the API at http://localhost:8086
4. Access the API documentation at http://localhost:8086/api

## Project Structure

```
{{projectName}}/
├── api/              # API Platform application
├── docker-compose.yml # Docker Compose configuration
├── Dockerfile        # Docker configuration
└── setup.sh         # Setup script
```

## Development

- The API is served on port 8086
- API documentation is available at /api
- GraphQL playground is available at /graphql
- Admin interface is available at /admin

## Security

- JWT authentication is configured
- CORS is enabled
- Rate limiting is implemented
- Input validation is enforced

## Best Practices

- Follow API Platform best practices
- Use proper validation
- Implement proper error handling
- Keep dependencies updated
- Regular security audits
